reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y excelente trato. Hice el service del auto y fui atendido de manera excelente por Mariano y Andrés del Concesionario. Cómo así también por Diego en la oficina del ACA. Todos cordiales y de excelente trato. Sigan así.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and excellent treatment. I had my car serviced and received excellent service from Mariano and Andrés at the dealership, as well as from Diego at the ACA office. Everyone was friendly and provided excellent service. Keep up the good work!
